<div class="astro-3wnvo4jq" role="main" pagefind-body="" lang="en" dir="ltr">

<div class="content-panel astro-37rzqhp2">

<div class="sl-container astro-37rzqhp2">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between astro-couag5ji">

1.  <a href="/directory/" class="c-breadcrumbs__link is-index" aria-current="false">Directory</a> <span class="c-breadcrumbs__separator" aria-hidden="true"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-couag5ji" /> </span>
2.  <a href="/kv/" class="c-breadcrumbs__link is-current" aria-current="location">KV</a>

</div>

# Cloudflare Workers KV

<div class="page-actions-wrapper astro-couag5ji">

<span id="page-actions-last-updated" class="not-content last-updated astro-jjhxq4hj"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-jjhxq4hj" /> <span class="astro-jjhxq4hj"> Last updated Apr 21, 2026 </span> </span> <span class="sep sep-last-updated astro-jjhxq4hj" aria-hidden="true"> \| </span>

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="copy-icon astro-jjhxq4hj" /> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="check-icon astro-jjhxq4hj" /> <span class="label-wrap astro-jjhxq4hj"> <span class="label astro-jjhxq4hj">Copy as Markdown</span> <span class="copied-label astro-jjhxq4hj" aria-hidden="true">Copied!</span> </span>

<span class="sep astro-jjhxq4hj" aria-hidden="true">\|</span> <a href="index.md" id="page-actions-view-md" class="not-content astro-jjhxq4hj" aria-label="View Page as Markdown" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-jjhxq4hj" /> <span class="astro-jjhxq4hj">View as Markdown</span></a> <span class="sep sep-agent-setup astro-jjhxq4hj" aria-hidden="true">\|</span>

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-jjhxq4hj" /> <span class="astro-jjhxq4hj">Agent setup</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="content-panel astro-37rzqhp2">

<div class="sl-container astro-37rzqhp2">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyBhcmlhLWhpZGRlbj0idHJ1ZSIgZmlsbD0iY3VycmVudENvbG9yIiB2aWV3Ym94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIGNsYXNzPSJhc3Ryby02dGtteG00NyI+IDx1c2UgaHJlZj0iI3N0YXJsaWdodC1pbWFnZS16b29tLWljb24tdW56b29tIiBjbGFzcz0iYXN0cm8tNnRrbXhtNDciIC8+IDwvc3ZnPg==" class="astro-6tkmxm47" />

<figure class="astro-6tkmxm47">

</figure>

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-6tkmxm47" />

<div class="sl-markdown-content astro-cedpceuv">

<div class="mt-2 text-xl leading-relaxed text-[var(--sl-color-gray-2)]">

Create a global, low-latency, key-value data storage.

</div>

<div class="font-semibold text-blue-700 dark:text-indigo-300">

Available on Free and Paid plans

</div>

Workers KV is a data storage that allows you to store and retrieve data globally. With Workers KV, you can build dynamic and performant APIs and websites that support high read volumes with low latency.

For example, you can use Workers KV for:

- Caching API responses.
- Storing user configurations / preferences.
- Storing user authentication details.

Access your Workers KV namespace from Cloudflare Workers using [Workers Bindings](/workers/runtime-apis/bindings/) or from your external application using the REST API:

<div class="tablist-wrapper not-content astro-37av7x7u">

- <a href="#tab-panel-9504" id="tab-9504" class="astro-37av7x7u" role="tab" aria-selected="true" tabindex="0">Workers Binding API</a>
- <a href="#tab-panel-9505" id="tab-9505" class="astro-37av7x7u" role="tab" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">REST API</a>

</div>

<div id="tab-panel-9504" aria-labelledby="tab-9504" role="tabpanel">

<div class="tablist-wrapper not-content astro-37av7x7u">

- <a href="#tab-panel-9500" id="tab-9500" class="astro-37av7x7u" role="tab" aria-selected="true" tabindex="0">index.ts</a>
- <a href="#tab-panel-9501" id="tab-9501" class="astro-37av7x7u" role="tab" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">wrangler.jsonc</a>

</div>

<div id="tab-panel-9500" aria-labelledby="tab-9500" role="tabpanel">

<div class="expressive-code">

<figure class="frame has-title not-content">
<pre data-language="ts"><code>export default {  async fetch(request, env, ctx): Promise&lt;Response&gt; {    // write a key-value pair    await env.KV.put(&#39;KEY&#39;, &#39;VALUE&#39;);
    // read a key-value pair    const value = await env.KV.get(&#39;KEY&#39;);
    // list all key-value pairs    const allKeys = await env.KV.list();
    // delete a key-value pair    await env.KV.delete(&#39;KEY&#39;);
    // return a Workers response    return new Response(      JSON.stringify({        value: value,        allKeys: allKeys,      }),    );  },
} satisfies ExportedHandler&lt;{ KV: KVNamespace }&gt;;</code></pre>
<div class="copy">
<div aria-live="polite">

</div>
<div>

</div>
</div>
<div class="explain">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," />
</div>
<figcaption><span class="title">TypeScript</span></figcaption>
</figure>

</div>

</div>

<div id="tab-panel-9501" aria-labelledby="tab-9501" role="tabpanel" hidden="">

<div class="expressive-code">

<figure class="frame not-content">
<pre data-language="json"><code>{  &quot;$schema&quot;: &quot;node_modules/wrangler/config-schema.json&quot;,  &quot;name&quot;: &quot;&lt;ENTER_WORKER_NAME&gt;&quot;,  &quot;main&quot;: &quot;src/index.ts&quot;,  &quot;compatibility_date&quot;: &quot;2025-02-04&quot;,  &quot;observability&quot;: {    &quot;enabled&quot;: true  },
  &quot;kv_namespaces&quot;: [    {      &quot;binding&quot;: &quot;KV&quot;,      &quot;id&quot;: &quot;&lt;YOUR_BINDING_ID&gt;&quot;    }  ]}</code></pre>
<div class="copy">
<div aria-live="polite">

</div>
<div>

</div>
</div>
<div class="explain">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," />
</div>
</figure>

</div>

</div>

See the full [Workers KV binding API reference](/kv/api/read-key-value-pairs/).

</div>

<div id="tab-panel-9505" aria-labelledby="tab-9505" role="tabpanel" hidden="">

<div class="tablist-wrapper not-content astro-37av7x7u">

- <a href="#tab-panel-9502" id="tab-9502" class="astro-37av7x7u" role="tab" aria-selected="true" tabindex="0">cURL</a>
- <a href="#tab-panel-9503" id="tab-9503" class="astro-37av7x7u" role="tab" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">TypeScript</a>

</div>

<div id="tab-panel-9502" aria-labelledby="tab-9502" role="tabpanel">

<div class="expressive-code">

<figure class="frame not-content">
<pre data-language="plaintext"><code>curl https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/$ACCOUNT_ID/storage/kv/namespaces/$NAMESPACE_ID/values/$KEY_NAME \    -X PUT \    -H &#39;Content-Type: multipart/form-data&#39; \    -H &quot;X-Auth-Email: $CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL&quot; \    -H &quot;X-Auth-Key: $CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY&quot; \    -d &#39;{      &quot;value&quot;: &quot;Some Value&quot;    }&#39;
curl https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/$ACCOUNT_ID/storage/kv/namespaces/$NAMESPACE_ID/values/$KEY_NAME \    -H &quot;X-Auth-Email: $CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL&quot; \    -H &quot;X-Auth-Key: $CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY&quot;</code></pre>
<div class="copy">
<div aria-live="polite">

</div>
<div>

</div>
</div>
<div class="explain">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," />
</div>
</figure>

</div>

</div>

<div id="tab-panel-9503" aria-labelledby="tab-9503" role="tabpanel" hidden="">

<div class="expressive-code">

<figure class="frame has-title not-content">
<pre data-language="ts"><code>const client = new Cloudflare({  apiEmail: process.env[&#39;CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL&#39;], // This is the default and can be omitted  apiKey: process.env[&#39;CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY&#39;], // This is the default and can be omitted});
const value = await client.kv.namespaces.values.update(&#39;&lt;KV_NAMESPACE_ID&gt;&#39;, &#39;KEY&#39;, {  account_id: &#39;&lt;ACCOUNT_ID&gt;&#39;,  value: &#39;VALUE&#39;,});
const value = await client.kv.namespaces.values.get(&#39;&lt;KV_NAMESPACE_ID&gt;&#39;, &#39;KEY&#39;, {  account_id: &#39;&lt;ACCOUNT_ID&gt;&#39;,});
const value = await client.kv.namespaces.values.delete(&#39;&lt;KV_NAMESPACE_ID&gt;&#39;, &#39;KEY&#39;, {  account_id: &#39;&lt;ACCOUNT_ID&gt;&#39;,});
// Automatically fetches more pages as needed.for await (const namespace of client.kv.namespaces.list({ account_id: &#39;&lt;ACCOUNT_ID&gt;&#39; })) {  console.log(namespace.id);}</code></pre>
<div class="copy">
<div aria-live="polite">

</div>
<div>

</div>
</div>
<div class="explain">
<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," />
</div>
<figcaption><span class="title">TypeScript</span></figcaption>
</figure>

</div>

</div>

See the full Workers KV [REST API and SDK reference](/api/resources/kv/) for details on using REST API from external applications, with pre-generated SDK's for external TypeScript, Python, or Go applications.

</div>

<a href="/kv/get-started/" class="sl-link-button not-content primary astro-eqmihizm">Get started</a>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<div class="heading-wrapper level-h2" tabindex="-1">

## Features

<a href="#features" class="anchor-link"><span class="anchor-icon" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," /></span></a>

</div>

<div class="feature mb-7 border-t border-t-[var(--color-cl1-gray-8)] pt-6 astro-ezsi7upz">

### Key-value storage

<div class="feature-description mb-3 text-base leading-[1.65] text-[var(--sl-color-text)] astro-ezsi7upz">

Learn how Workers KV stores and retrieves data.

</div>

<a href="/kv/get-started/" class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 border-b-2 border-b-[var(--color-cl1-brand-orange)] pb-px text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--sl-color-white)] no-underline transition-[border-color] duration-200 ease-in-out hover:border-b-[var(--sl-color-white)] astro-ezsi7upz">Use Key-value storage <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-ezsi7upz astro-jsgs62qu" /></a>

</div>

<div class="feature mb-7 border-t border-t-[var(--color-cl1-gray-8)] pt-6 astro-ezsi7upz">

### Wrangler

<div class="feature-description mb-3 text-base leading-[1.65] text-[var(--sl-color-text)] astro-ezsi7upz">

The Workers command-line interface, Wrangler, allows you to [create](/workers/wrangler/commands/general/#init), [test](/workers/wrangler/commands/general/#dev), and [deploy](/workers/wrangler/commands/pages/#pages-deploy) your Workers projects.

</div>

<a href="/workers/wrangler/install-and-update/" class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 border-b-2 border-b-[var(--color-cl1-brand-orange)] pb-px text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--sl-color-white)] no-underline transition-[border-color] duration-200 ease-in-out hover:border-b-[var(--sl-color-white)] astro-ezsi7upz">Use Wrangler <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-ezsi7upz astro-jsgs62qu" /></a>

</div>

<div class="feature mb-7 border-t border-t-[var(--color-cl1-gray-8)] pt-6 astro-ezsi7upz">

### Bindings

<div class="feature-description mb-3 text-base leading-[1.65] text-[var(--sl-color-text)] astro-ezsi7upz">

Bindings allow your Workers to interact with resources on the Cloudflare developer platform, including [R2](/r2/), [Durable Objects](/durable-objects/), and [D1](/d1/).

</div>

<a href="/kv/concepts/kv-bindings/" class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 border-b-2 border-b-[var(--color-cl1-brand-orange)] pb-px text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--sl-color-white)] no-underline transition-[border-color] duration-200 ease-in-out hover:border-b-[var(--sl-color-white)] astro-ezsi7upz">Use Bindings <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-ezsi7upz astro-jsgs62qu" /></a>

</div>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<div class="heading-wrapper level-h2" tabindex="-1">

## Related products

<a href="#related-products" class="anchor-link"><span class="anchor-icon" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," /></span></a>

</div>

<div class="grid grid-cols-[32px_auto] items-start gap-x-2">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="text-7xl text-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]" />

<div class="mt-0!">

**<a href="/r2/" class="text-black! decoration-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]">R2</a>**

Cloudflare R2 Storage allows developers to store large amounts of unstructured data without the costly egress bandwidth fees associated with typical cloud storage services.

</div>

</div>

<div class="grid grid-cols-[32px_auto] items-start gap-x-2">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="text-7xl text-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]" />

<div class="mt-0!">

**<a href="/durable-objects/" class="text-black! decoration-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]">Durable Objects</a>**

Cloudflare Durable Objects allows developers to access scalable compute and permanent, consistent storage.

</div>

</div>

<div class="grid grid-cols-[32px_auto] items-start gap-x-2">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="text-7xl text-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]" />

<div class="mt-0!">

**<a href="/d1/" class="text-black! decoration-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]">D1</a>**

Built on SQLite, D1 is Cloudflare’s first queryable relational database. Create an entire database by importing data or defining your tables and writing your queries within a Worker or through the API.

</div>

</div>

------------------------------------------------------------------------
